zh.Fressin, Pas de Calais, Hauts-de-France,: 法國豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯福雷辛
zh.Fressin, Pas-de-Calais-Nord-Pas-de-Calai: 法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯福雷辛
zh.Fressin, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France,: 法國豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯福雷辛
zh.lifeSummary: 當Chevalier Jean IV de Créquy於1369年出生在法國豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯福雷辛時，他的父親Jean DE CRÉQUY III34歲，母親Dame Jeanne de Haveskerke18歲。他於1395年4月27日與Jeanne de Roye Dame d'Espourdon在法國豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯福雷辛結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於1411年11月30日在他的家鄉享年42歲，埋葬在法國豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯福雷辛。

zh-hans.Fressin, Pas-de-Calais-Nord-Pas-de-Calai: 法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯福雷辛
zh-hans.Fressin, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France,: 法国豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯福雷辛
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Chevalier Jean IV de Créquy于1369年出生在法国豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯福雷辛时，他的父亲Jean DE CRÉQUY III34岁，母亲Dame Jeanne de Haveskerke18岁。他于1395年4月27日与Jeanne de Roye Dame d'Espourdon在法国豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯福雷辛结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他去世于1411年11月30日在他的家乡享年42岁，埋葬在法国豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯福雷辛。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Créquy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Lucienne, Renold, Romain.  Spanish Alejandro, Eduardo, Beatriz, Juana, Mario, Porfirio.

Altered form of northern French Crequi: variant of Créquy, a habitational name from Créquy, a place in Pas-de-Calais, so named from Kreko, a personal name of ancient Germanic origin, + the suffix -iacum.

nameMeanings.name: Jean
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Like Jane and Joan , a medieval variant of Old French Je(h)anne. Towards the end of the Middle Ages this form became largely confined to Scotland. In the 20th century it became more widely used in the English-speaking world and enjoyed a period of great popularity, but it is now out of fashion. Among numerous well-known and influential bearers are the British novelists Jean Plaidy ( Eleanor Hibbert , 1910–93 ) and Jean Rhys ( Ella Gwendolen Rees Williams , 1894–1979 ), British actress Jean Simmons ( 1929–2010 ), and American-born actress Jean Seberg ( 1938–79 ). It is also found as a variant spelling of the masculine name Gene .

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

nameMeanings.name: IV
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: probably a contracted form of  Jep , vernacular form of   Jacob   .

en.lifeSummary: When Chevalier Jean IV de Créquy was born in 1369, in Fressin, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, his father, Jean DE CRÉQUY III, was 34 and his mother, Dame Jeanne de Haveskerke, was 18. He married Jeanne de Roye Dame d'Espourdon on 27 April 1395, in Fressin, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 6 daughters. He died on 30 November 1411, in his hometown, at the age of 42, and was buried in Fressin, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Chevalier Jean IV de Créquy est né en 1369, à Fressin, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, son père, Jean DE CRÉQUY III, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Dame Jeanne de Haveskerke, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Jeanne de Roye Dame d'Espourdon le 27 avril 1395, à Fressin, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé le 30 novembre 1411, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 42 ans, et a été enterré à Fressin, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Chevalier Jean IV de Créquy 1369 in Fressin, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Jean DE CRÉQUY III 34 und seine Mutter Dame Jeanne de Haveskerke 18. Er hat am 27. April 1395 in Fressin, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich Jeanne de Roye Dame d'Espourdon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb am 30. November 1411 im Alter von 42 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Fressin, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Chevalier Jean IV de Créquy è nato il nel 1369 nel Fressin, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, il suo padre, Jean DE CRÉQUY III, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Dame Jeanne de Haveskerke, aveva 18 anni. Lui sposato Jeanne de Roye Dame d'Espourdon il 27 aprile 1395, nel Fressin, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 30 novembre 1411, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 42 anni, e fu sepolto a Fressin, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Chevalier Jean IV de Créquyが1369年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスプアス-デ-カレイスフレシンで生まれた時，父Jean DE CRÉQUY IIIは34歳，母Dame Jeanne de Haveskerkeは18歳であった。1395年4月27日にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスプアス-デ-カレイスフレシンでJeanne de Roye Dame d'Espourdonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1411年11月30日に故郷で42歳で死去し，フランスハウトス-デ-フランスプアス-デ-カレイスフレシンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Chevalier Jean IV de Créquy(이)가 1369년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 파스-데-캘레이 프레신에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Jean DE CRÉQUY III(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Dame Jeanne de Haveskerke(은)는 18세였다. 그는 1395년 4월 27일 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 파스-데-캘레이 프레신에서 Jeanne de Roye Dame d'Espourdon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1411년 11월 30일 그의 고향에서 42세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 파스-데-캘레이 프레신에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Chevalier Jean IV de Créquy nasceu em 1369, em Fressin, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, França, seu pai, Jean DE CRÉQUY III, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Dame Jeanne de Haveskerke, tinha 18 anos. Ele casou-se com Jeanne de Roye Dame d'Espourdon em 27 de abril de 1395, em Fressin, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele faleceu em 30 de novembro de 1411, em sua cidade natal, com 42 anos, e foi sepultado em Fressin, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Chevalier Jean IV de Créquy родился в 1369 г. в местности фрессин, пас-де-калеи, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция, его отцу по имени Jean DE CRÉQUY III было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Dame Jeanne de Haveskerke, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Jeanne de Roye Dame d'Espourdon 27 апреля 1395 г. в местности фрессин, пас-де-калеи, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 6 дочерей. Он умер 30 ноября 1411 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 42 лет и был похоронен в местности фрессин, пас-де-калеи, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Chevalier Jean IV de Créquy nació en 1369, en Fressin, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, su papá, Jean DE CRÉQUY III, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Dame Jeanne de Haveskerke, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Jeanne de Roye Dame d'Espourdon el 27 de abril de 1395, en Fressin, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 30 de noviembre de 1411, en su pueblo, a la edad de 42 años, y fue sepultado en Fressin, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia.
